question:
Why is "ghosting" widely viewed as a harmful way to end a relationship?
A) It denies the other person closure and leaves them confused and doubting themselves.
B) It is legally actionable in most jurisdictions.
C) It forces the person being ghosted to move to a new city.
D) It means the relationship never actually happened.
